---
output:
  beamer_presentation:
    theme: "CambridgeUS"
    colortheme: "dolphin"
    fonttheme: "structurebold"
    df_print: kable
fontsize: 14pt
classoption: "aspectratio=169"
header-includes:
- \usepackage{caption}
- \captionsetup[figure]{labelformat=empty}
- \captionsetup[table]{labelformat=empty}
- \setbeamertemplate{page number in head/foot}[]{}
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
## Render the pdf
##rmarkdown::render(input = "./04_1-Data_Project1.Rmd", output_file = "./04_1-Data_Project1.pdf")

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```


## Today's Agenda
\LARGE
\center

Data Project 1: Due Sunday (Sep 19)

\vspace{.5in}

\Large
Justin Leinaweaver (Fall 2021)


## Paper 1 Prompt
\Large
\center
Prepare a report \textbf{introducing and analyzing} our first data project. 

\vspace{.2in}

+ What are the \textbf{strengths and weaknesses} of this project for measuring regime type? 

+ Support all claims with evidence.


## Download \& knit the new Rmd file on Moodle
\center
\includegraphics[keepaspectratio=true,width=.5\paperwidth]{Images/04_1-moodle.png}


## {.plain}
\center
\includegraphics[keepaspectratio=true,width=.95\paperwidth]{Images/04_1-code_folding1.png}



## {.plain}
\center
\includegraphics[keepaspectratio=true,width=.95\paperwidth]{Images/04_1-code_folding2.png}




## Brainstorming Section 1: Ideas to Share?
\large

### Introducing the Freedom House Data Project
\vspace{.2in}
+ Who runs this project?
\vspace{.2in}
+ What are their aims?
\vspace{.2in}
+ Why is this project important?


## Brainstorming Section 2: Ideas to Share?
\large

### Analyzing the Methodology
\vspace{.2in}
+ What are the strengths of the methodology?
\vspace{.2in}
+ What are the weaknesses of the methodology?
\vspace{.2in}
+ Illustrate arguments using evidence from the codebook and the data


## Brainstorming Section 3: Ideas to Test?
\Large
\center
Use the data to present and analyze the world in 2021

::: columns
:::: column
### Categorical
+ `PR rating`
+ `CL rating`
+ `Status`
::::
:::: column
### Numerical
+ `Total`
+ `PR`
+ `CL`
::::
:::



## Section 3: Things to Try (2021 only)
\large

### Bar plots
1. `PR rating`
2. `CL rating`
3. `Status`

### Box plots or Histograms PLUS Descriptive stats
1. `Total`
2. `PR`
3. `CL`
